name: I was partly at fault in warehouse forklift crash on job can I still get paid?
description: Workers' comp pays regardless of fault; third-party reduced if <50% your fault.[3]

mainEntity.name: I was partly at fault in warehouse forklift crash on job can I still get paid?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers' comp pays regardless of fault; third-party reduced if <50% your fault.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes for workers' comp, as it doesn't require proving fault; third-party suits reduce by your percentage if under 50%.** Utah's modified comparative fault bars recovery only if you're over 50% at fault.[3] Key factors: Comp pays medical/lost wages regardless; for extra damages against others, evidence minimizes your fault share. Gather incident reports, videos, witness accounts.[3] Fault doesn't bar comp benefits.
